title: Castle View Primary Academy (Lancaster): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Castle View Primary Academy  URN: 148231  Notice issued to: Cidari Education Limited (Cidari Multi-Academy Trust)  Reason for issue: ‘Requires significant improvement’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Vicky Beer  DfE regional director office: North West  Local authority: Lancashire County Council  "

taxons.title: Inspection of maintained schools and academies
